mapper.sql: id, business_no,source_no,inner_code, `type`, code, publisher, pre_owner, current_owner, `status`, extend_field1, extend_field2, extend_param,active_time, creator_id, create_time, updator_id, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: insert into code_record (id, business_no,source_no,inner_code, `type`, code, publisher, pre_owner, current_owner, `status`, extend_field1, extend_field2, extend_param, active_time,creator_id, create_time, updator_id, update_time, deleted ) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{businessNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{sourceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},,#{innerCode} #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{publisher,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{preOwner,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{currentOwner,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{extendField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{extendField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{extendParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{activeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleted,jdbcType=BIGINT} )

insert into code_record
id,
business_no,
source_no,
inner_code,
`type`,
code,
publisher,
pre_owner,
current_owner,
`status`,
extend_field1,
extend_field2,
extend_param,
active_time,
creator_id,
create_time,
updator_id,
update_time,
deleted,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{businessNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sourceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{innerCode},
#{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{publisher,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{preOwner,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{currentOwner,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{extendField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{extendField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{extendParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{activeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{creatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{deleted,jdbcType=BIGINT},

insert into code_record (business_no,source_no,inner_code, `type`, code, publisher, current_owner,pre_owner, `status`, extend_field1,extend_field2, extend_param, creator_id ) values
( #{item.businessNo},#{item.sourceNo},#{item.innerCode}, #{item.type}, #{item.code}, #{item.publisher}, #{item.currentOwner},#{item.preOwner}, #{item.status}, #{item.extendField1},#{item.extendField2}, #{item.extendParam}, #{item.creatorId} )
mapper.update:
update code_record
status = #{status},
extend_field1 = #{extendField1},
extend_field2 = #{extendField2},
extend_param = #{extendParam},
active_time = #{activeTime},
updator_id = #{updatorId},
update_time = #{updateTime},
deleted = #{deleted},
where id = #{id}

update code_record
pre_owner = #{po.preOwner},
current_owner = #{po.currentOwner},
status = #{po.status},
extend_field1 = #{po.extendField1},
extend_field2 = #{po.extendField2},
extend_param = #{po.extendParam},
active_time = #{po.activeTime},
updator_id = #{po.updatorId},
update_time = #{po.updateTime},
deleted = #{po.deleted},
where id = #{id} and status = #{status}
